ddls:
CREATE TABLE "automobiles" (
  "auto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each automobile */,
  "make" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the automobile */,
  "model" TEXT /* The specific model of the automobile */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the automobile was manufactured */,
  "buying_price" TEXT /* Buying price category (e.g., low, medium, high, vhigh) */,
  "maintenance_cost" TEXT /* Maintenance cost category (e.g., low, medium, high, vhigh) */,
  "num_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the automobile */,
  "num_persons" INTEGER /* Number of persons the automobile can accommodate */,
  "luggage_boot" TEXT /* Size of the luggage boot (e.g., small, med, large) */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating category (e.g., low, med, high) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* The type of fuel the automobile uses */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* The size of the engine in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* The horsepower of the automobile */,
  "mpg_city" REAL /* Miles per gallon in city driving conditions */,
  "mpg_highway" REAL /* Miles per gallon in highway driving conditions */,
  "emissions_rating" TEXT /* The emissions rating of the automobile */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the automobile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation criterion (e.g., price, safety) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the criterion */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Range of acceptable weight values for the criterion */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the criterion */,
  "criterion_type" TEXT /* The type of criterion (e.g., cost, safety, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decision_outcomes" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision outcome */,
  "auto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the automobile evaluated */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation criterion */,
  "decision" TEXT /* The decision made (e.g., acceptable, unacceptable) */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the decision made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A confidence score indicating how certain the decision is (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decision_outcomes_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decision_outcomes_auto_id FOREIGN KEY ("auto_id") REFERENCES automobiles ("auto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* The user's status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_decisions" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the decision */,
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the decision made */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was logged */,
  "decision_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made by the user when logging the decision */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* The status of the decision (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_decisions_decision_id FOREIGN KEY ("decision_id") REFERENCES decision_outcomes ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_decisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight entry */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation criterion */,
  "weight_value" REAL /* Weight value assigned to the criterion */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date from which the weight is effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The date when the weight expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criteria_weights_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of evaluation findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, ad-hoc) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* The user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "auto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the automobile evaluated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or additional feedback provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_feedback_auto_id FOREIGN KEY ("auto_id") REFERENCES automobiles ("auto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
